reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención. Esperé 30 minutos porque estaban cambiando de turno. Al pagar en efectivo no tenían cambio porque recién empezaba el turno. Otros 15 minutos hasta que consiguió el cambio

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. I waited 30 minutes because they were changing shifts. When I paid in cash, they didn't have change because the shift had just started. It took another 15 minutes before they got me change.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7293247840782148336/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQydU5PNEhREAE
